auth.login_desc: Use your account credentials to access the admin dashboard.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we will send a password reset link if the account exists.
auth.forgot_password_success: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.reset_password_desc: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.reset_password_success: Your password has been reset. You can sign in now.
auth.reset_password_missing_token: Reset token is missing from the URL.
auth.reset_password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

root_mode.dialog_desc: Root mode grants elevated privileges on system containers. All actions are audited at high severity.

home.subtitle: Container management, stack deployments, and audit logging for air-gapped environments.

create_container.title: Create Container

create_container.command_override_help: Shell-style command to override the image's default CMD (optional).
create_container.no_port_bindings: No port bindings. Click Add to expose ports.
create_container.owner_scope_help: Team or unit that owns this container.

settings.title: Settings
settings.secret_copy_failed: Failed to copy secret to clipboard.
settings.secret_copy_empty: Generate or enter a secret value before copying.

api_server.endpoint_url_desc: Swagger/OpenAPI URL used by the Endpoint page.
api_server.container_name_desc: Container name used for start/stop/restart controls.

system_init.description: Configure and initialize shared services with immediate apply.
system_init.no_fields: No settings are required for this step.

users.title: User Management
users.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{email}}"? This action cannot be undone.

container_detail.exec_id_label: Exec ID (use with your websocket client):
container_detail.exec_help: Create an exec session into this container. The returned exec ID can be used with a terminal websocket client.

observability.title: Cost Observability
observability.no_requests: No requests found in this time range.
observability.pricing_info: Prices are estimates used for cost tracking. They do not affect billing or provider charges.
observability.wizard_pricing_description: Optionally set input/output token pricing for cost tracking. You can skip this and configure pricing later.

llm_providers.title: LLM Providers
llm_providers.confirm_delete: Delete this provider and its runtime? This cannot be undone.
llm_providers.endpoint_url_help: Base URL of the remote inference API (e.g. https://api.example.com/v1)
llm_providers.api_key_help: Optional authentication key for the remote endpoint

llm_models.title: LLM Models
llm_models.empty: No models registered. Download from Hugging Face or register a local path.
llm_models.download_dispatch_failed: Model queued but download could not be dispatched: {{error}}. Go to Jobs page and click Retry.
llm_models.confirm_delete: Delete this model and all its jobs/artifacts?
llm_models.in_use_message: "{{model}}" cannot be deleted because it is currently used by one or more active providers.

llm_runtimes.title: LLM Runtimes
llm_runtimes.gpu_none: No supported GPU detected — CPU mode
llm_runtimes.remote_provider_hint: This provider is a remote endpoint — no container or GPU configuration needed.
llm_runtimes.image_not_local: Image not found locally — pull required before creating runtime.

llm_runtime_detail.max_model_len_help: Maximum sequence length the model will handle (e.g. 4096). Leave blank for model default.
llm_runtime_detail.extra_args_help: Additional command-line arguments passed to the runtime engine (one per line, e.g. --enforce-eager).
llm_runtime_detail.enforce_eager: Legacy GPU support (uses XFormers backend for compute capability < 8.0 — e.g. TITAN RTX, V100, GTX 10xx/20xx)
llm_runtime_detail.swap_space_help: CPU swap space per GPU in GiB (e.g. 4). Leave blank for vLLM default (1 GiB in legacy GPU mode).

llm_graph.title: Agent Trace
llm_graph.select_node: Select a node to inspect metadata.
llm_graph.failed_load_traces: Failed to load graph trace events.

rag_runtime.title: RAG Runtime Config
rag_runtime.description: Embedding and chunking settings are pushed from llm.port core to llm_port_rag.
rag_runtime.not_configured: Runtime config is not configured yet.
rag_runtime.lite_settings_hint: RAG Lite settings are managed on the Settings page under the RAG category.

rag_search.title: RAG Search
rag_search.description: Run internal ACL-aware retrieval queries against indexed RAG chunks.

rag_lite.documents_description: Upload and manage documents for RAG Lite vector search.

rag_lite.collections_description: Organise documents into collections for scoped search.
rag_lite.confirm_delete_collection: Delete this collection and unlink its documents?

rag_lite.empty_explorer: No collections or documents yet. Create a collection or upload a file to get started.

agents_api_docs.title: Endpoint

errors.not_found: The requested page could not be found.

containers.title: Container Management
containers.description: Manage lifecycle, logs, and policies for infrastructure and app containers.

llm_server.title: LLM Server Management
llm_server.description: Register providers, models, and runtimes to serve LLM workloads from one admin surface.

tracing.title: LLM Tracing
tracing.description: Visualize live LLM flows and observe request traces for debugging and operations.

endpoint.title: Centralized API Endpoint
endpoint.description: Use a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint gateway with policy, routing, and observability controls.

modules.disabled_message: The {{module}} module is not enabled in this deployment.
modules.disabled_hint: Contact your administrator to enable this module.

rag.name: RAG
rag.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation — document ingestion, vector search and knowledge base.

pii.name: PII / Privacy
pii.description: PII detection and redaction using Presidio and spaCy NLP models.

mailer.name: Mailer
mailer.description: Email notification service for alerts, reports and user communication.

auth.name: Auth Provider
auth.description: External authentication provider (Keycloak) for SSO and identity management.

docling.name: Docling
docling.description: Advanced document conversion service for PDF, DOCX, PPTX and spreadsheet parsing.

mcp.name: MCP
mcp.description: Model Context Protocol tool registry — governed broker for external MCP servers.

modules_tab.title: Optional Modules
modules_tab.description: Enable or disable optional modules. Disabling a module stops its containers; enabling starts them.
modules_tab.no_modules: No optional modules are configured in this deployment.
modules_tab.not_configured: Not configured. Set the corresponding environment variable and restart to enable.
modules_tab.confirm_enable_body: This will start all containers for the {{module}} module.
modules_tab.confirm_disable_body: This will stop all containers for the {{module}} module. Any in-flight requests will be interrupted.

pii_dashboard.title: PII Dashboard
pii_dashboard.no_data: No PII scan data yet. Events will appear as the gateway processes requests with PII policies enabled.

pii_policy.pii_service_url_help: Internal URL for llm_port_pii (for example http://llm-port-pii:8000/api).
pii_policy.hidden_when_disabled: PII settings are hidden because the PII module is currently disabled.
pii_policy.tenants_description: Override the default PII policy for a specific tenant.
pii_policy.precedence_hint: Precedence: tenant override > system default > none.

nodes.maintenance_tooltip: Maintenance mode pauses workload scheduling and marks the node for servicing. Existing workloads continue running.
nodes.drain_tooltip: Drain gracefully migrates all running workloads off this node before taking it offline. New workloads will not be scheduled here.
nodes.refresh_inventory_tooltip: Request the node agent to rescan hardware inventory (CPU, memory, GPU, disk, network interfaces).
nodes.diagnostics_tooltip: Collect diagnostic logs and system state from the node agent for troubleshooting.
nodes.no_logs_for_host: No logs found for host "{{host}}" in the last 15 minutes.

node_profiles.name: Name

node_profiles.delete_confirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? Nodes using this profile will be unassigned.

system_updates.tooltip: Check and apply OS package and firmware updates on this node
system_updates.idle_message: Click "Check Updates" to scan for available system package and firmware updates on this node.
system_updates.reboot_required: A system reboot is required to complete the update. Please reboot at your earliest convenience.
